name: Asparagus Fromage
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the mushroom caps in margarine until browned.
2. Remove mushrooms from the pan and set aside.
3. To make the sauce, add flour to the melted margarine and cook for a minute.
4. Gradually add milk while stirring continuously until the mixture thickens.
5. Add salt, mustard, and sherry; stir to combine.
6. Place cooked asparagus on a serving platter.
7. Cover with browned almonds and top with mushrooms.
8. Pour sauce over the asparagus and sprinkle grated cheese evenly.
9. Place under low heat until the cheese melts.
10. Sprinkle with paprika, if desired.
11. Serve immediately.
